content.en:
The Hundred Illusion Beads only treat the symptoms but not the root cause, and they can't hide the fact that Ye Tian controls time.

However, at the very least, there will be much less shock and exclamation from the outside world, if it is really known to the outside world that Ye Tian has controlled time with a half-step transcendence realm legendary lord, for example, the True Saintless Land will really destroy Ye Tian at all costs.

At this time, the Frostless Lord said again: "Endless Lord, in the next few years, the True Immortal Holy Land will release some signals one after another, proving that you have stepped into the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm, and obtained some treasures that greatly improve the control of time, and we will make you a person who thinks you are extremely lucky." The theory of luck is true, and the legendary lords are almost all children of luck, but when it comes to the realm of the legendary lord, it is difficult for luck to have an effect. But once you still show great luck, luck is really good. Last time, you obtained the "One Four-Zero" benefit in the Yang Lie Lord's Cemetery, and when this news is spoken, the outside world will believe it. "

"After a long time, your identity as the son of luck is confirmed, your luck is super good, and you get all kinds of chance treasures, then in the future, you expose the secret of controlling time, and the outside world will only think that you have obtained many treasures by luck, which is the control of time, and will not think that it is your natural qualifications, so that your threat to other forces is much less. "

The Frostless Lord said.

Ye Tian was shocked, the Frostless Lord had thought about it so much, and he had thought of it all.

But for him, this is a good thing, anyway, it is all operated by the True Unholy Land, and he doesn't need to care about anything

Suddenly.

The Frostless Lord said again: "Endless Lord, there will be a big operation in the True Immortal Land next, and you will even be allowed to participate, but this time I suggest that you do not participate, if you get the Kukai Gravel in the middle of the operation, I will give you one in charge." "

"Lord Frostless, what kind of action, if I can participate in the action without revealing my identity, is it allowed to participate?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Don't reveal your identity?" Lord Frostless pondered for a moment and said, "If you don't reveal your identity, I'll allow you to participate in the action." "

Ye Tian smiled, then it's no problem.

It's just too easy to reveal your identity without revealing it

He can completely copy other people's bodies, and then use the Hundred Illusion Beads to change the cultivation realm, or even the breath, so that even if the Legendary Realm Lord peeks into time and space, it will definitely not be him, thinking that other Legendary Lords are involved.

If he didn't participate in the action and got a grain of empty sea gravel, he wouldn't want to go.

Moreover, what if the Holy Land is not able to obtain the Grains of Kukai Gravel?

Therefore, he had to participate in person to increase his hope of obtaining the Kukai Gravel, after all, the other people in the True No Holy Land would not do their best to obtain the Kukai Gravel, maybe a certain Legendary Lord or a half-step Legendary Realm Lord obtained the Kukai Gravel, and if he didn't say it, he was unwilling to hand it over, who could say anything

Sometimes, you have to be on your own.

Therefore, he would have counted entirely on the absence of a holy place.

Then, Lord Frostless said, "Lord Tianqi, Time and Space Ancient Leaf, Lord Yugu has provided a message that you can listen to. "

Ancient Leaves of Time and Space!

Ye Tian's expression was shocked, and he listened sincerely.

"There is a peak Legendary Realm Lord in the Void Region, an old man with a white beard, this person is very ancient, and even has more than one eternal master, he has a space-time ancient leaf in his hand, but if you want this person to give you the space-time ancient leaf, I'm afraid it will be very difficult. "

The Frostless Lord revealed.

"I see, thank you Lord Frostless.

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently, the Frostless Lord left, as for what action, this time he still didn't say, he needed to prove that he could hide his identity before he could get the Frostless Lord to agree.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of eternal years passed.

this day.

The Frostless Lord descended on Ye Tian's residence again

"Endless Lord, the operation of the True Immortal Land is about to begin, if you have a way to prove that you can hide your identity, such as successfully concealing me, I will take you there. "Lord Frost Freedom said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a replica body appeared.

This replica body was not his own body, but the body of another half-step transcendent realm legendary lord.

This is the copy body of a fallen legendary lord that he has found after wandering away from the eternal sea over the years, and that legendary lord was originally just a realm realm legendary lord.But he used these copy bodies to cultivate a little, remodeled his body, and then directly promoted to the transcendent realm legendary lord, which is the real transcendent realm legendary lord 0........

As long as he annihilates this replica body by then, it will not affect the other bodies.

Therefore, the strength exerted by this replica body is even stronger than the main body.

"It's ......"

The Frostless Lord looked at Ye Tian's replica body and immediately frowned.

"Endless Lord, this Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm is the Legendary Lord of which force, and why did you bring it into the True Void Holy Land?"

Lord Frostless asked.

"This is my doppelganger!"

Ye Tian said.

"Doppelganger, impossible, the soul breath is different, nothing is different, how can it be your doppelganger?"

The Frostless Lord didn't believe it.

At this time, Ye Tian showed the power to control time with this replica body.

Airplanes!

The surrounding time was completely under Ye Tian's control

Seeing this scene, the Frostless Lord was shocked

Take control of your time!

If Ye Tian found another Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord and also controlled time, it was unlikely, when there was no such coincidence, two such demonic Legendary Lords appeared at the same time?

Soon, the Frostless Lord really believed that Ye Tian's Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord body was a clone.

"Yes, even I can't tell who he is, I just think it's someone else. Is the appearance and aura of this clone someone else's?" said Lord Frostless.

"Yes, the 0.9 Strange Lord has fallen, and I have paid a great price to completely imitate him, even if it is exposed, there will be no suspicion of my identity. Ye Tian said.

"That's no problem, come with me, you clone. "

The Frostless Lord took Ye Tian's clone to a void.

In this void, one after another Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land, many half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and some Transcendent Realm Lords were all here.

When Ye Tian arrived, it aroused the doubts of many lords of the True Saintless Land.

In the end, under the guarantee of the Frostless Lord, those Legendary Realm Lords acquiesced, while the other Legendary Lords did not know Ye Tian's identity, and the Frostless Lord did not need to inform them

Then.

Lord Longgu, as a representative, revealed the operation. _
